name: Llama 2 13B
note: Mid-size Llama 2 base model, pretrained on 2T tokens with a 4K context window and the first commercially-licensed Llama generation.
tpsNote: No verified base-model-specific RTX 4090 figure; the widely-cited ~71 tok/s Ollama benchmark for 'llama2:13b' targets Ollama's default chat-tuned weights, not this base checkpoint.

results.notes: Reported by Meta in the Llama 2 model card

verificationNotes: Confirmed via Hugging Face meta-llama/Llama-2-13b page (13B params, 4096 ctx, Llama 2 Community License) and release date 2023-07-18 corroborated by Ollama/HF sources. Fetched MODEL_CARD.md and confirmed MMLU 54.8 appears for the Llama-2-13B pretrained row. No changes made.
